title: Name the framework Switchboard
context: The front door routes a goal to the right tier-pinned workers, like an operator connecting a call.

options.name: AgentTeam
options.tradeoff: Collides with Claude Code's Agent Teams feature and names the peer model we rejected.

options.name: AgentHarness
options.tradeoff: Generic; names only the execution wrapper, misses the decision spine.

options.name: Relay
options.tradeoff: Already used by an internal L&W project.

options.name: Switchboard
options.rationale: Maps to the actual routing mechanism.

reasoning: Best fit to the mechanism (route a goal to the right line), avoids the Agent Teams collision, and the operator/console metaphor extends cleanly to the future nexus tier.
